title: Account Info page layout
description: Build the /account page with a back navigation to dashboard and sections for each account management action.
acceptanceCriteria: Page has a header with a back arrow and 'Account Info' title
Page contains distinct sections: Display Name, Email, Password, Weight Unit, Delete Account
Each section has a title and its own form/control

steps.details: Create src/web/src/pages/AccountPage.tsx. Layout: full page with sticky top bar containing a back button (lucide-react ArrowLeft icon + useNavigate to /dashboard) and 'Account Info' title. Below: scrollable content area with max-w-lg mx-auto padding for centered content on large screens.

Add Card components for each section: 'Display Name', 'Email Address', 'Password', 'Weight Unit', 'Danger Zone' (for delete account). Each card has a CardHeader with title and CardContent for the form. Forms will be wired up in TASK-28 through TASK-32.
Navigate to /account. Take screenshot. Click back arrow — verify navigation to /dashboard. Verify all sections are visible. Verify mobile layout.

technicalNotes: Use the same top bar style as the dashboard for visual consistency
The 'Danger Zone' delete section should use red/destructive colors from shadcn theme
